name: worklog-skills
description: Turn messy work notes into reviewable work memory, daily logs, and long-term report evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Remember what you did before the details disappear
interface.longDescription: Turn fragmented work or research notes into a rough review draft first, then approved daily logs and reusable evidence for weekly reports, performance reviews, lab meetings, and research updates.
defaultPrompt: Organize these raw notes into a daily worklog.
Clean up today's fragmented work notes for review.
Turn these notes into review evidence.
